backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining all data types (academic entries, coding challenges, user profiles) and canister state, with access control, academic marks management, coding challenge/attempt storage, and admin export/import functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (frequency polygon chart, grade average stats, subject raw marks, subject high/low stats) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling Internet Identity authentication, profile setup gating, admin detection, and top-level module navigation between Academic, Coding, Users, and Data panels.
frontend/src/components/AcademicModule.t: Six-tab academic module container (Add Marks, View Progress, Subject Analysis, 9-Scale Grades, Combined %, Certificates) that switches to the Progress tab after a successful mark submission.
frontend/src/components/AddMarksForm.tsx: Marks entry form that dynamically renders subject fields based on grade, stream, and subgroup selections, with grade/stream-specific max marks, board exam badge for grades 10 and 12, and validation before submission.
Displays academic achievement certificates grouped by grade/term, assigning platinum/gold/silver/bronze tiers based on an adjusted percentage formula ((original% + 94) / 2) with tier-specific styling and images.
frontend/src/components/CodingEditor.tsx: A Python coding editor component that lets users select challenges, write code, run it via Pyodide in the browser, and save attempts with an optional score to the backend.
frontend/src/components/CodingHistory.ts: Displays a paginated, accordion-style history of saved coding attempts, showing challenge title, timestamp, score, submitted code, and output for each entry.
frontend/src/components/CodingModule.tsx: Container component for the Python coding practice section that renders a two-tab layout switching between the CodingEditor and CodingHistory components.
frontend/src/components/CombinedPercenta: Shows a combined academic percentage view by grouping entries by grade and stream, computing adjusted per-term percentages and an overall combined percentage, with grade-level filtering.
frontend/src/components/DataManagement.t: Admin-facing data management panel that supports exporting academic entries and coding attempts as JSON or CSV, and importing data back into the system via file upload or drag-and-drop.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with an animated heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with navigation tabs (Academic, Coding, Data, Users), theme toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality. Shows module tabs only when authenticated and admin-only Users tab conditionally.
frontend/src/components/NineScaleGradesV: Displays academic entries converted to a 9-point grading scale with filterable cards per entry, a scale legend, and per-subject grade badges. Supports filtering by grade, stream, and term.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A form card that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it as their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProgressView.tsx: Shows academic progress with summary stats, bar/line charts, and a sortable table of entries, filterable by grade, section, and term. Includes frequency distribution and letter grade calculations.
frontend/src/components/SubjectAnalysisV: Renders per-subject statistics (average, highest, lowest percentage) as a grouped bar chart and summary cards, with filters for grade, stream, and term.
frontend/src/components/UserManagement.t: Admin panel form that allows assigning User or Admin roles to other users by entering their Internet Identity Principal ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePyodide.ts: React hook that lazily loads the Pyodide WebAssembly Python runtime from CDN and exposes a runPython function that executes Python code and captures stdout/stderr output.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, roles, academic entries, grade aggregates, coding challenges, and other data operations with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/boardExam.ts: Utility functions for Grade 10 and 12 board exam calculations, including AI subject substitution logic that replaces the lowest core subject score if it improves the total.
frontend/src/lib/frequencyPolygon.ts: Computes a 10-bucket frequency distribution (0–100 in 10-point intervals) from an array of AcademicEntry records using their termPercentage field.
frontend/src/lib/gradeCalculation.ts: Utility functions for converting raw marks or percentages into letter grades, 9-scale grades, and corresponding Tailwind color classes used consistently across the application.
frontend/src/lib/maxMarks.ts: Defines grade-wise maximum marks rules and helper functions to retrieve max marks per subject, per grade, and per term, including special handling for board exams and subjects like Computer, AI, Kannada, EVS, and PE.
frontend/src/lib/percent.ts: Provides utility functions for clamping, formatting, and calculating adjusted and combined term percentages, including the formula `(percentage + 94) / 2` used for certificate tier determination.
frontend/src/lib/subjectAnalysis.ts: Computes per-subject statistics (average, highest, lowest marks and percentages) from academic entries, resolving correct max marks using grade/term context for accurate percentage calculations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues for an educational progress tracking app with analytics, grading, and board exam features.
